meta.description: Wild Rift bot lane carry data (ADC + APC) – updated with QWER skill references and pick/avoid examples

champions.name: Aphelios

goodAgainst.name: Sivir
goodAgainst.note: Burst through spell shield with Crescendum

badAgainst.name: Kai'Sa
badAgainst.note: Can't match her mobility and burst

champions.caution: Weapon order matters. Learn your rotations.
champions.tips: Red+White for DPS, Green+Purple for picks. Plan your weapons.
pickWhen: You know your weapon combos
Team needs utility and sustained DPS
Enemy has immobile ADCs (e.g., Jhin, Sivir)
avoidWhen: Enemy has assassins (e.g., Zed, Fizz)
Need early game pressure
Enemy has Draven or Vayne

champions.name: Ashe

goodAgainst.name: Zeri
goodAgainst.note: Outranges and slows her down with W

goodAgainst.name: Kai'Sa
goodAgainst.note: Pokes her before she can engage with W

goodAgainst.name: Vayne
goodAgainst.note: Pokes her out early with W

badAgainst.name: Jhin
badAgainst.note: Gets burst down before she can kite

avoidSynergies.name: Yuumi
avoidSynergies.note: Lacks engage to follow up on slows

champions.caution: Very immobile — position carefully and rely on your support for peel.
champions.tips: Use E (hawkshot) to track enemy jungle. Save R (arrow) for engages or self-peel.
pickWhen: Your team has frontline to protect you
Enemy has immobile champions you can kite
Need utility and engage (with R)
avoidWhen: Enemy has multiple assassins/divers
Enemy has heavy poke that outranges you
Your team lacks frontline

champions.name: Brand
champions.caution: Very squishy. Needs to position safely.
champions.tips: Passive detonation does % HP damage. Combo: E > Q > W.
pickWhen: Enemy team clumps up
Your team needs magic damage
Enemy has heavy HP-stackers (tanks)
avoidWhen: Enemy has mobile divers (e.g., Pyke, Leona)
Enemy has multiple spell shields (e.g., Sivir, Morgana)
Your team lacks frontline

champions.name: Caitlyn

goodAgainst.name: Zeri
goodAgainst.note: Outranges and zones her with auto range

goodAgainst.name: Aphelios
goodAgainst.note: Pokes him out early with Q

avoidSynergies.name: Seraphine
avoidSynergies.note: Less reliable root for trap combos

champions.caution: Falls off late if not ahead. Must dominate early.
champions.tips: Place traps (W) under CC'd enemies. Headshot + Q is your main trading combo.
pickWhen: You want to siege towers fast
You have engage support for trap combos (e.g., Morgana, Lux)
Enemy has short-range ADC (e.g., Lucian, Sivir)
avoidWhen: Enemy has heavy dive/gap closers
Enemy has better scaling and can survive lane
Enemy has Ezreal (too slippery)

champions.name: Cassiopeia
champions.caution: Immobile. Position carefully.
champions.tips: Q for poke. W for ground (anti-mobility). E for sustain. R for CC.
pickWhen: Enemy lacks mobility
Need sustained DPS and AP damage
Your team has frontline
avoidWhen: Enemy has assassins (e.g., Zed, Akali)
Need early game pressure
Your team lacks peel

champions.name: Corki

goodAgainst.name: Ziggs
goodAgainst.note: Dodges poke and all-ins with W

goodAgainst.name: Vayne
goodAgainst.note: Bursts her before she can scale

champions.caution: Weak to early lane pressure. Needs an engage support to shine.
champions.tips: Package (passive) is game-changing for objectives. Use it to contest dragon/baron.
pickWhen: Your team lacks magic damage
Enemy team is squishy
You need hybrid damage
avoidWhen: Enemy has heavy poke
Enemy has point-and-click lockdown
Enemy has pure tanks

champions.name: Draven

goodAgainst.name: Caitlyn
goodAgainst.note: All-ins her before she can poke

badAgainst.name: Aphelios
badAgainst.note: Matches his damage with better range

avoidSynergies.name: Janna
avoidSynergies.note: Lacks engage to set up axes

champions.caution: Dropping axes loses trades. Must stay aggressive but not overextend.
champions.tips: Always catch axes (Q) unless it puts you in danger. Passive stacks = gold.
pickWhen: Enemy ADC is immobile (e.g., Sivir, Varus, Zeri)
You have engage support (e.g., Leona, Nautilus)
You want to snowball early
avoidWhen: Enemy has point-and-click CC (e.g., Lissandra, Pantheon)
Enemy can kite you effectively (e.g., Ashe, Jhin)
Enemy has Senna (out-ranges and pokes)

champions.name: Ezreal

goodAgainst.name: Ashe
goodAgainst.note: Too slippery to lock down with E

champions.caution: Cannot all-in like other ADCs. Requires poke and peel.
champions.tips: Weave autos between Qs for max DPS. E is your only escape—save it!
pickWhen: You need a safe laner
Enemy has dive champions you can kite (e.g., Darius, Garen)
Your support is an enchanter (e.g., Yuumi, Karma)
avoidWhen: Enemy has unstoppable engage (e.g., Malphite, Vi)
Your team needs early game ADC
Enemy has sustain that out-heals your poke (e.g., Soraka, Nami)

champions.name: Heimerdinger
champions.caution: Turrets (Q) have long CD early. Don't waste them.
champions.tips: Place turrets (Q) defensively. Use E (grenade) for stun. R for empowerment.
pickWhen: Enemy has low waveclear
Need zone control
Enemy has immobile melee champions
avoidWhen: Enemy has assassins (e.g., Zed, Akali)
Need mobility
Enemy can kill turrets easily (e.g., Lucian, Draven)

champions.name: Jhin

goodAgainst.name: Varus
goodAgainst.note: Bursts him before he can poke

goodAgainst.name: Aphelios
goodAgainst.note: Bursts him before he can DPS

avoidSynergies.name: Yuumi
avoidSynergies.note: His reload makes her less effective

champions.caution: Four shot system requires patience. Fourth shot is your kill threat.
champions.tips: Root with W before ulting. Learn to dance between reloads.
pickWhen: Enemy team is squishy
You have CC support for root combos (e.g., Morgana, Leona)
Need burst and utility
avoidWhen: Enemy has multiple tanks
Enemy has champions that can dive you (e.g., Malphite, Vi)
Enemy has sustain that out-heals your burst (e.g., Soraka)

champions.name: Jinx

avoidSynergies.name: Pyke
avoidSynergies.note: Roams too much, leaves her exposed

champions.caution: Extremely weak early game. Must farm safely to scale.
champions.tips: Rockets (Q) for teamfights, minigun for single targets. Passive resets are your win condition.
pickWhen: Your team has frontline to protect you
Enemy has no hard engage
Game will go late
avoidWhen: Enemy has early game lane bullies (e.g., Draven, Lucian)
Enemy has multiple assassins (e.g., Zed, Akali)
Your team lacks frontline

champions.name: Kai'Sa
champions.caution: Needs to evolve abilities to reach power spikes. Farm is critical.
champions.tips: Get Q evolve ASAP. Use E invisibility to reposition in fights.
pickWhen: Enemy has dive champions you can out-play (e.g., assassins)
You have engage support (e.g., Leona, Nautilus)
Need mobile hypercarry
avoidWhen: Enemy has point-and-click CC (e.g., Lissandra, Pantheon)
Enemy can poke you out of lane (e.g., Caitlyn, Ezreal)
Your team lacks engage

champions.name: Kalista

goodAgainst.name: Senna
goodAgainst.note: Bursts her before she can poke

goodAgainst.name: Jhin
goodAgainst.note: Can't hit her with fourth shot

champions.caution: Loses effectiveness late game. Must snowball early.
champions.tips: Use E to execute minions and champions. Stack spears then rend.
pickWhen: Enemy bot lane is immobile (e.g., Senna, Jhin)
You have engage support (e.g., Thresh, Leona)
You want early game dominance
avoidWhen: Enemy has point-and-click CC (e.g., Lissandra, Pantheon)
Enemy can slow/root you (e.g., Ashe, Morgana)
Your team needs late game scaling

champions.name: Karma
champions.caution: Your mantra (R) is your identity. Use it wisely.
champions.tips: Mantra (R) + Q for poke, Mantra (R) + E for team shield and speed.
pickWhen: Enemy has immobile bot lane
You need poke and utility
Your ADC is safe (e.g., Ezreal, Caitlyn)
avoidWhen: Enemy has engage supports (e.g., Blitz, Thresh)
Your team needs engage
Your ADC needs peel (e.g., Vayne, Kog'Maw)

champions.name: Karthus
champions.caution: Immobile. Position is crucial.
champions.tips: Q for poke. W for slow. R for global damage.
pickWhen: Enemy lacks mobility
Your team needs global pressure (R)
Need scaling magic damage
avoidWhen: Enemy has assassins (e.g., Zed, Akali)
Need early game pressure
Your team lacks frontline

champions.name: Kog'Maw
champions.caution: No mobility whatsoever. Position is everything.
champions.tips: Turn on W to shred tanks. Keep passive in mind for post-death damage.
pickWhen: Your team can peel for you
Enemy has tanks you need to shred
Game will go late
avoidWhen: Enemy has multiple assassins
Enemy has heavy dive comp (e.g., Malphite, Vi)
Your team lacks frontline

champions.name: Lucian

goodAgainst.name: Miss Fortune
goodAgainst.note: Dashes out of her ult (R) with E

champions.caution: Falls off late. Must win lane and snowball.
champions.tips: E + auto + Q + auto is your main trade combo. Use R to push waves.
pickWhen: Enemy has immobile ADC (e.g., Varus, Miss Fortune)
You need early game presence
You have engage support (e.g., Nami, Leona)
avoidWhen: Enemy has better scaling and can survive lane (e.g., Vayne)
Enemy has point-and-click CC (e.g., Lissandra)
Your team needs late game scaling

champions.name: Lux

goodAgainst.name: Thresh
goodAgainst.note: Poke him from range with E

goodAgainst.name: Blitzcrank
goodAgainst.note: Poke him from range with E

goodAgainst.name: Nautilus
goodAgainst.note: Poke him from range with E

champions.caution: Squishy. Don't get caught.
champions.tips: Q for root. E for poke. W for shield. R for burst.
pickWhen: Enemy has immobile bot lane
Need poke and burst
You have ADC that can follow up on root (e.g., Caitlyn, Jhin)
avoidWhen: Enemy has engage supports (e.g., Leona, Blitz)
Heavy dive comps
Enemy has Morgana (black shield)

champions.name: Miss Fortune

goodAgainst.name: Vayne
goodAgainst.note: Bursts her in lane with Q

avoidSynergies.name: Janna
avoidSynergies.note: Can ult enemies out of bullet time (R)

champions.caution: Ult (R) is easily interrupted. Need CC support to guarantee it.
champions.tips: Q bounce is your main poke tool. Position for maximum R usage.
pickWhen: Your team has AoE CC for your ult (e.g., Leona, Amumu)
Enemy team is squishy
Need lane dominance
avoidWhen: Enemy has multiple interrupts (e.g., Janna, Alistar)
Enemy can dive you easily (e.g., Malphite, Vi)
Your team lacks frontline

champions.name: Morgana
champions.caution: Black shield (E) has long CD. Don't waste it.
champions.tips: Q for root. E for shield. W for poke. R for teamfight CC.
pickWhen: Enemy has engage supports (e.g., Thresh, Blitz, Leona)
You need poke and utility
Your ADC needs spell shield protection
avoidWhen: Enemy has poke supports (e.g., Brand, Zyra)
Enemy has Lulu (polymorph)
Your team needs engage

champions.name: Nilah
champions.caution: Melee range makes her vulnerable. Needs sustain to survive.
champions.tips: Your W gives dodge chance. Use E to engage and Q for sustain.
pickWhen: Enemy has weak early game
You have sustain support (e.g., Soraka, Nami)
Enemy has immobile ADC
avoidWhen: Enemy has heavy poke (e.g., Caitlyn, Lux)
Enemy can kite you easily (e.g., Ashe, Jhin)
Your support lacks peel

champions.name: Samira
champions.caution: Needs hard CC support to get in range. Can't engage without setup.
champions.tips: Stack passive with E + Q. Save W to block projectiles.
pickWhen: You have engage support (e.g., Nautilus, Leona)
Enemy has squishy champions
You want to snowball early
avoidWhen: Enemy has point-and-click CC (e.g., Lissandra, Pantheon)
Enemy can kite your engage (e.g., Ashe, Jhin)
Your support lacks engage

champions.name: Senna
champions.caution: Very squishy. Bad positioning gets you killed instantly.
champions.tips: Collect souls from poke. Build lethality for damage, enchanter for utility.
pickWhen: Enemy has enchanter support (e.g., Soraka, Nami)
Your team has frontline
Need scaling utility (heal, shield, root)
avoidWhen: Enemy has hard engage (e.g., Leona, Blitz)
Enemy has multiple assassins (e.g., Zed, Akali)
Your team lacks frontline

champions.name: Seraphine
champions.caution: Very squishy. Position carefully.
champions.tips: Double cast E for root, double cast W for heal. Ultimate (R) is game-changing.
pickWhen: Enemy has engage comp you can kite (e.g., Alistar, Rakan)
Your team needs AP damage and utility
Team needs teamfight control with R
avoidWhen: Enemy has mobile assassins (e.g., Zed, Akali)
Enemy has hook supports (e.g., Pyke, Blitz)
Your team needs pure engage

champions.name: Sivir

avoidSynergies.name: Blitzcrank
avoidSynergies.note: Hook can be inconsistent with her W

champions.caution: Lacks kill pressure. Focus on farm and waveclear.
champions.tips: Use spell shield (E) to block key abilities. Q is your main damage tool.
pickWhen: Enemy has heavy poke (e.g., Ezreal, Varus)
You want to neutralize lane
Your team needs waveclear
avoidWhen: Enemy has better scaling (e.g., Jinx, Vayne)
Enemy has dive comp (e.g., Malphite, Vi)
Your team needs early kill pressure

champions.name: Smolder
champions.caution: Early game is weak. Needs peel and scaling.
champions.tips: Stack your passive for true damage. Position safely in teamfights.
pickWhen: You have peel support (e.g., Braum, Alistar)
Enemy has immobile ADC
Game will go late
avoidWhen: Enemy has early game lane bullies (e.g., Draven, Lucian)
Enemy has dive comp (e.g., Malphite, Vi)
Your support lacks peel

champions.name: Tristana

goodAgainst.name: Caitlyn
goodAgainst.note: Jumps on her and bursts with E+W

badAgainst.name: Jhin
badAgainst.note: Gets burst before she can jump

champions.caution: W is your engage and escape. Use it wisely.
champions.tips: E + auto + W + auto is your kill combo. Reset W for cleanup.
pickWhen: Enemy has immobile ADC (e.g., Ashe, Varus)
You have engage support (e.g., Leona, Nautilus)
Need burst and tower damage
avoidWhen: Enemy has point-and-click CC (e.g., Lissandra, Pantheon)
Enemy can kite your jump (e.g., Ezreal, Jhin)
Your support lacks engage

champions.name: Twitch

badAgainst.name: Samira
badAgainst.note: Can block his attacks with W

avoidSynergies.name: Leona
avoidSynergies.note: Engage can put him in danger

champions.caution: Very weak early game. Must survive to scale.
champions.tips: Use Q to reposition in fights. Ultimate (R) gives long range and piercing.
pickWhen: Enemy has immobile ADC (e.g., Varus, Ashe)
You have peel support (e.g., Lulu, Braum)
Need late game hypercarry
avoidWhen: Enemy has point-and-click burst (e.g., Zed, Akali)
Enemy has sweepers/control wards
Your team lacks frontline

champions.name: Varus
champions.caution: Immobile — vulnerable to dive. Needs peel.
champions.tips: Can be built AD or AP. Use E to apply grievous wounds.
pickWhen: Enemy has low mobility
You need poke or anti-heal
Your team has frontline
avoidWhen: Enemy has heavy dive (e.g., Malphite, Vi)
Enemy has multiple assassins (e.g., Zed, Akali)
Your team lacks frontline

champions.name: Vayne
champions.caution: Extremely weak early game. Must survive to scale.
champions.tips: Silver bolts (W) do % max HP true damage. Use Q to dodge skillshots.
pickWhen: Enemy has tanks you need to shred
You have peel support (e.g., Lulu, Braum)
Game will go late
avoidWhen: Enemy has lane bullies (e.g., Draven, Caitlyn)
Enemy has point-and-click CC (e.g., Lissandra)
Your team lacks frontline

champions.name: Veigar
champions.caution: Weak early game. Needs to stack AP safely.
champions.tips: Use cage (E) to zone and trap. Stack passive on minions and champions.
pickWhen: Your team needs magic damage and scaling
Enemy has immobile champions (e.g., Draven, Tristana)
You can safely stack AP against low-pressure bot lane
avoidWhen: Enemy has Sivir (spellshield) or Olaf (ignores cage)
Enemy has early pressure (e.g., Draven, Leona)
Your team needs engage

champions.name: Vel'Koz
champions.caution: Squishy and immobile. Position carefully.
champions.tips: Q for poke. W for waveclear. E for CC. R for true damage burst.
pickWhen: Enemy has immobile bot lane (e.g., Ashe, Sona)
Your ADC can follow up on your CC (e.g., Jhin, Caitlyn)
Team needs poke and true damage
avoidWhen: Enemy has engage supports (e.g., Leona, Nautilus)
Enemy has mobile assassins (e.g., Zed, Akali)
Your team lacks frontline

champions.name: Xayah
champions.caution: Root combo requires precise feather placement.
champions.tips: Setup feathers with Q + autos, then E to root and burst.
pickWhen: Enemy has engage comp you can kite (e.g., Alistar, Rakan)
You have CC support for root combos (e.g., Rakan, Morgana)
Need burst and kiting
avoidWhen: Enemy has better scaling (e.g., Jinx, Vayne)
Enemy can dodge your feathers (e.g., Ezreal, Kalista)
Your support lacks engage

champions.name: Xerath
champions.caution: Squishy and immobile. Position is crucial.
champions.tips: Q for poke. W for slow. E for stun. R for burst.
pickWhen: Enemy has immobile bot lane (e.g., Ashe, Sona)
Your ADC can follow up on your CC (e.g., Jhin, Caitlyn)
Team needs long-range poke and burst
avoidWhen: Enemy has engage supports (e.g., Leona, Nautilus)
Enemy has mobile assassins (e.g., Zed, Akali)
Your team lacks frontline

champions.name: Yunara

goodAgainst.name: Caitlyn
goodAgainst.note: Out-scales her after mid-game; can dodge traps with E

goodAgainst.name: Jhin
goodAgainst.note: Out-trades him with stacked passive; sustain through his burst

goodAgainst.name: Varus
goodAgainst.note: Dodges his poke with E; out-scales

goodAgainst.name: Ashe
goodAgainst.note: Can cleanse slows with E; out-duels with stacked passive

goodAgainst.name: Xayah
goodAgainst.note: Dodges feathers with E; out-sustains her burst

badAgainst.name: Draven
badAgainst.note: Gets out-traded early; can't match his burst

badAgainst.name: Lucian
badAgainst.note: Gets out-burst early; can't trade into his combo

badAgainst.name: Nilah
badAgainst.note: Sustains through your damage; out-trades you

badAgainst.name: Vayne
badAgainst.note: Out-duels you late; true damage melts you

badAgainst.name: Samira
badAgainst.note: Bursts you before you can stack; W blocks your projectiles

strengths: Infinite stacking passive — gains bonus damage and attack speed per stack
Strong sustain with Q (heal based on stacks)
E grants cleanse + movement speed + damage amp
R is a global execute that scales with stacks
Can carry late game with proper stacking
synergies: Engage supports (Leona, Nautilus, Thresh) – can follow up on your damage
Peel supports (Lulu, Braum, Janna) – protect you while you stack
Frontline tanks (Ornn, Malphite) – keep you alive in teamfights
avoidSynergies: Poke supports (Lux, Brand, Zyra) – you need peel, not poke
Roaming supports (Pyke, Bard) – you need protection while stacking
Squishy comps – you need frontline to survive
pickWhen: Game will go late – you scale with stacks
You have peel support (e.g., Lulu, Braum)
Enemy has tanks you can stack against
You need a hypercarry with sustain and global presence (R)
Enemy has immobile ADC (e.g., Varus, Ashe, Jhin)
avoidWhen: Enemy has early game lane bullies (e.g., Draven, Lucian)
Enemy has dive comps (e.g., Malphite, Vi)
Your team lacks frontline
Enemy has strong assassins that can burst you (e.g., Zed, Akali)
Your support lacks peel
champions.tips: Prioritize stacking your passive in laning phase. Use Q for sustain. Save E to cleanse critical CC (roots/stuns). Use R (global execute) to secure kills across the map. Position safely in teamfights and let your stacks do the work. Don't force fights early – you need to scale.

champions.name: Zeri
champions.caution: Very weak early game. Needs peel and scaling.
champions.tips: Use passive to steal shields. Q is your main damage — don't miss.
pickWhen: You need a hypercarry
You have peel support (e.g., Yuumi, Lulu)
Game will go late
avoidWhen: Enemy has early game bullies (e.g., Draven, Lucian)
Enemy has point-and-click CC (e.g., Lissandra, Pantheon)
Your team lacks frontline

champions.name: Ziggs

badAgainst.name: Samira
badAgainst.note: Can dash through his poke with E

champions.caution: No mobility. Position is everything.
champions.tips: Use ultimate (R) to waveclear or secure objectives. W to siege towers.
pickWhen: Your team lacks magic damage
Enemy has weak early game
Need poke and waveclear
avoidWhen: Enemy has mobile assassins (e.g., Zed, Akali)
Enemy has sustain (e.g., Soraka, Nami)
Your team lacks frontline

champions.name: Zilean
champions.caution: Squishy. Position carefully.
champions.tips: Q for stun. W for CD reset. E for speed. R for revive.
pickWhen: Enemy has engage supports (e.g., Blitz, Nautilus)
Your ADC benefits from movespeed (e.g., Ezreal, Lucian)
Team needs revive utility to counter burst
avoidWhen: Enemy has heavy poke (e.g., Brand, Xerath)
Your team needs engage
Enemy has Morgana (black shield)

champions.name: Zyra
champions.caution: Rooted while using abilities. Position safely.
champions.tips: Place plants (W) in hook paths to block skillshots. E + W + Q is your poke combo.
pickWhen: Enemy has engage supports (plants counter hooks) (e.g., Thresh, Blitz)
Your team needs AP damage and zone control
Enemy has immobile bot lane
avoidWhen: Enemy has sustain that outheals your poke (e.g., Soraka, Nami)
Enemy can kill plants easily (e.g., Miss Fortune, Lucian)
Your team lacks frontline
